nodes.label: Janma Rasi (natal Moon sign) - reference point for all transit results
1st house from Moon (Janma Rasi position)
2nd house from Moon
3rd house from Moon
4th house from Moon
5th house from Moon
6th house from Moon
7th house from Moon
8th house from Moon
9th house from Moon
10th house from Moon
11th house from Moon
12th house from Moon
Verdict: auspicious / benefic transit result
Verdict: malefic / inauspicious transit result
Verdict: mixed / moderate transit result
Sun benefic transit houses from Moon = 3, 6, 10, 11
Sun malefic transit houses from Moon = 1, 2, 4, 5, 7, 8, 9, 12 (worst in 5th per Tamil texts)
Sun in 5th from Moon is the WORST Sun transit (Tamil texts): imprisonment, danger to life, lawsuit loss, many diseases
Sun benefic effect: good health, gains from many sources, promotion, victory over enemies, fame, name
Sun malefic effect: eye trouble, headache, stomach pain, fever, quarrel with wife, humiliation, leave home, over-expenditure
Moon benefic transit houses from Moon = 1, 3, 6, 7, 10, 11
Moon malefic transit houses from Moon = 2, 4, 5, 8, 9*, 12 (worst in 8th = Chandrashtama)
Chandrashtama: Moon in 8th from natal Moon - most malefic Moon transit (piles, theft, litigation, fear of Maraka, possible death)
Moon in 9th from Moon: Sanskrit texts say bad, Tamil texts say good - author follows Tamil (net good)
Moon benefic effect: recovery from sickness, comforts, delicious food, conveyance, increase of income, family supplies
Moon malefic effect: sorrows, miseries, diseases, obstructions, unwanted expenditure, bad time to mother
Mars benefic transit houses from Moon = 3, 6, 11 only
Mars malefic transit houses from Moon = 1, 2, 4, 5, 7, 8, 9, 10, 12 (worst in 7th)
Mars in 7th from Moon = WORST Mars transit (Tamil): quarrel, conflict, imprisonment, danger to life in maraka, drinking habit
Mars benefic effect: income from many sources, victory over enemies, recovery from chronic illness, marriage, gains in litigation
Mars malefic effect: wounds, blood contamination, accidents (fire/vehicle/weapon), quarrels, theft, loss of money, danger to life
Mercury benefic transit houses from Moon = 4, 6, 8, 10, 11
Mercury malefic transit houses from Moon = 1, 2, 3, 5, 7, 9, 12 (worst in 2nd per Tamil palm-leaf)
Mercury in 2nd from Moon = WORST (Tamil palm-leaf): infection, sickness, quarrels, fear of death if maraka; BUT Brihat Samhita says income/inflow
Mercury benefic effect: sharp intellect, success in education, high standard of life, income, status, foreign travel gains
Mercury malefic effect: mental confusion, poverty, bilious/eye disease, enmity with co-borns, false accusations, theft
Jupiter benefic transit houses from Moon = 2, 5, 7, 9, 11 (best in 11th)
Jupiter malefic transit houses from Moon = 1, 3, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12 (worst in 3rd)
Jupiter in 3rd from Moon = WORST Jupiter transit: ominous sorrow, fear, sibling ill-health, displacement, debt, loss of job/business
Jupiter in 9th from Moon relieves all difficulties because 9th is Poorva Punya Sthana (merit house)
Jupiter benefic effect: wealth, male child, promotion, new vehicles/clothes/jewels, gold, foreign travel gains, status
Jupiter malefic effect: unwanted transfer, enmity, dull intellect, punishment in job, humiliation, theft of jewels, fear

Rationale: Tamil text illustrates Jupiter's malefic houses via Ramayana/Mahabharata heroes (Rama exiled in Janma Rasi, Duryodhana killed in 3rd, kingdom/life lost in 8th, Shiva's ruin in 10th, Yudhishthira's gambling loss in 4th, Mandavya crucified in 6th)
Venus benefic transit houses from Moon = 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 8, 9, 11, 12
nodes.source_location: Venus chapter (Brihat Samhita) / Table-12 / Vedha table

nodes.label: Venus malefic transit houses from Moon = 6, 7, 10 (worst in 7th per Tamil)
Venus in 7th from Moon = WORST Venus transit (Tamil): bad health to wife, enmity, loss of status, sexual diseases, heavy loans, Maraka danger
Venus benefic effect: easy life, sound health, maximum sexual pleasure, delicious sweet food, flow of wealth, promotion, gain through females
Venus malefic effect (6,7,10): difficulties, sorrows, enemies, bad health to wife, loss of status, sickness, lack of sexual pleasure, insults/quarrels
Saturn benefic transit houses from Moon = 3, 6, 11 (traditionally 3,6 only; Tamil adds 11th)
Saturn malefic transit houses from Moon = 1, 2, 4, 5, 7, 8, 9, 10, 12 (worst as Janma Sani in 1st)
nodes.source_location: Saturn chapter / Table-12 / Sade Sati chapter

nodes.label: Saturn benefic effect (3,6,11): all comforts, gain of money, pleasure through women, progress in business/profession, promotion in job
Saturn malefic effect: loans, unwanted expenditure, disease, displacement/transfer, fight with wife, destruction of property, danger to life
Sade Sati: 7.5-year Saturn transit over 12th, 1st, 2nd from natal Moon (90 months)
Janma Sani: Saturn in 1st from Moon (middle 2.5 yrs of Sade Sati) - the WORST/most malefic Saturn transit, dangerous to life
Ardhashtama Sani (Kantaka/Laghu Kalyani): Saturn in 4th from Moon - harassment, poverty, paralysis/wind disease, separation from wife
Kantaka Sani: Saturn in 7th from Moon - worse than 4th; danger to wife, demotion, loss of status/respect
Ashtama Sani (Kalyani): Saturn in 8th from Moon - trouble equivalent to death; next worst after Sade Sati
Saturn in 9th from Moon: Tamil texts say Raja Yoga/aristocratic comforts, Sanskrit texts say bad (Pithru Samah Nithya Dukham) - net moderate
Saturn Sade Sati rounds: Mangu (dull, 1st round), Pongu (fertile, 2nd), Kungu (depressing, 3rd), Marana (death-inflicting, 3rd/4th)
Anga Sani: Sade Sati distributed across body parts - first 2.5 yrs Head, second 2.5 yrs Heart (worst), last 2.5 yrs Feet
Sage Pulippani rule: Sade Sati worst for Chara (movable) rasis - especially Kataka (Cancer); lesser for Sthira (Simha, Vrischika); Ubhaya rasis unaffected except Janma Sani
Rahu benefic transit houses from Moon = 3, 6, 10, 11 (10th mixed)
Rahu malefic transit houses from Moon = 1, 2, 4, 5, 7, 8, 9, 12 (worst in 8th)
Rahu benefic effect (3,6,11): money from many sources, victory over enemies, cure of disease, gain through outside/widow women, respect
Rahu malefic effect: undiagnosable diseases, food poisoning, black magic, scandal via widow, bad for parents, loss, danger to life in 8th
Ketu benefic transit houses from Moon = 3, 6, 10, 11 (less malefic / more benefic than Rahu)
Ketu malefic transit houses from Moon = 1, 2, 4, 5, 7, 8, 9, 12 (8th as bad as Rahu)
Ketu benefic effect (3,6,11): victory over enemies, income up, name & fame, courage, aristocrat life (Raja Yoga), spiritual sharpness
Ketu malefic effect: mental worry, small pox/skin disease, enmity with co-born, fire accidents (females), sanyasi tendency, loss of children
Ketu in 12th from Moon: 12th is Moksha Sthana and Ketu is significator of spirituality - native experiences self-realisation
Gochara Vedha: a benefic transit's good results are CANCELLED when another planet sits in the specific Vedha house from Moon
nodes.source_location: Gochara Vedha and Vipareetha Vedha chapter

nodes.label: Vipareetha (Viloma) Vedha: a malefic transit's bad results are CANCELLED/NULLIFIED when another planet sits in the specific opposite house from Moon
nodes.source_location: Gochara Vedha and Vipareetha Vedha chapter

nodes.label: Sun Gochara Vedha pairs (benefic->Vedha): 3<->9, 6<->12, 10<->4, 11<->5; NO Vedha to Sun by Saturn
Moon Gochara Vedha pairs: 1<->5, 3<->9, 6<->12, 7<->2, 10<->4, 11<->8; NO Vedha to Moon by Mercury
Mars Gochara Vedha pairs: 3<->12, 6<->9, 11<->5
Mercury Gochara Vedha pairs: 2<->5, 4<->3, 6<->9, 8<->1, 10<->8, 11<->12; NO Vedha to Mercury by Moon
Jupiter Gochara Vedha pairs: 2<->12, 5<->4, 7<->3, 9<->10, 11<->8
Venus Gochara Vedha pairs (benefic->Vedha): 1<->8, 2<->7, 3<->1, 4<->10, 5<->9, 8<->5, 9<->11, 11<->3, 12<->6; NO Vedha to Venus by Sun
Saturn/Rahu/Ketu Gochara Vedha pairs (shared): 3<->12, 6<->9, 11<->5; NO Vedha to Saturn by Sun
Nakshatra Vedha: transit effects through stars neutralised by a planet occupying a specified Nakshatra counted from natal planet's star (16 positions)
Ashtakavarga Phala: separate branch used for reconciliation of Gochara Phala (a planet may pass through its own bindus)
Moorthi Nirnaya: method based on position of transit Moon from natal Moon when a planet enters a new sign
nodes.source_location: Transit Stellar Occupational Results / Moorthi Nirnaya

nodes.label: Tripataka Chakra: table identifying three planets ruling each year in the 108-year life cycle
Paryaya (cycle): one full transit cycle of Jupiter or Saturn; results vary by age/cycle (Desh-Kaal-Patra)
Paksha rule: transit results given separately for Shukla Paksha (waxing) and Krishna Paksha (waning); malefics strong in Krishna Paksha, benefics in Shukla Paksha
Latta (Puro/forward & Prustha/rear): star afflicted by counting specific stars from a planet's star; Latta over natal star gives sickness/ruin/death/difficulties
Retrograde rule: retrograde benefic in favourable position intensifies good; retrograde malefic in favourable position neutralises good; stationary planets radiate strong energy
Dignity rule: planet in exaltation/own/friendly sign gives good even in a bad house from Moon; in debilitation/enemy sign reduces benefic and intensifies malefic results
Mrityubhaga: fatal degrees in each Rasi; malefic transit + maraka dasa + planet in Mrityubhaga raises probability of death
Maraka Dasa: death-dealing dasa period; when coinciding with malefic transit and completed life span, danger to life / death
Dasha Bhukti: time-distribution from birth star; weighed together with transit (both reckoned from Moon)
Bodhaka/Vedhaka/Poshaka/Karaka: dasa-of-planet classification (Vedhaka dasa obstructs Bodhaka dasa); Rahu/Ketu do not act as these
nodes.source_location: Bodhaka, Vedhaka, Poshaka and Karaka chapter

nodes.label: Tithi-Shoonya and Gochara: net transit result gets cancelled when transit coincides with a Tithi-Shoonya sign from Moon
Life-area effect: wealth / income / gains / financial improvement
Life-area effect: loss of money / unwanted expenditure / poverty
Life-area effect: disease / ill-health / bodily affliction
Life-area effect: recovery from sickness / good health restored
Life-area effect: quarrel / conflict / enmity / litigation / imprisonment
Life-area effect: victory over enemies / success over opponents
Life-area effect: travel / displacement / forced exile from home
Life-area effect: status / promotion in job / honour / fame
Life-area effect: loss of status / humiliation / loss of respect
Life-area effect: spouse / marriage / family / children outcomes
Life-area effect: danger to life / death (with Maraka) - severe outcome
Life-area effect: spirituality / devotion / self-realisation / pilgrimage
Life-area effect: comforts / delicious food / vehicles / luxuries
Life-area effect: birth of child / progeny gain (or Putra Dosha / loss of child when malefic)
Life-area effect: instant Raja Yoga / aristocratic status & elevation
Life-area effect: black magic / undiagnosable disease / occult affliction (Rahu/Ketu)
Source-conflict rule: where Sanskrit (Brihat Samhita) and ancient Tamil texts (Sundarananda/Jothida Kalanjiyam) disagree on a transit result, author favours Tamil reading
Mars in 9th from Moon: Tamil (Jothisha Kalanjiyam) gives good (clothes, marriage, child), Sanskrit gives bad (loss of respect, weakness)
Sun in 8th from Moon gives Putra Dosha (lack of progeny), danger to life, head/eye disease, funerals

edges.source_location: Mercury 2nd: Tamil bad vs Brihat Samhita income
Janma Sani middle of Sade Sati
Sanivah Rahu - Rahu results based on Saturn
Kujavah Ketu - Ketu results based on Mars
No Vedha by Saturn to Sun
No Vedha by Mercury to Moon
No Vedha by Sun to Venus
Jupiter in 3rd cancels Saturn 12th Sade Sati
Jyothish Kalangiam: Sun good even in bad house if exalted/own
Latta of Jupiter over natal star may give death
Recurring: danger to life if Maraka runs
Ketu spirituality both via 12th and Gnana Karaka nature
Moon Janma Rasi = instant Raja Yoga
Mercury 8th = high standard of life (unusual benefic 8th)
Venus Janma Rasi (Brihat Samhita - erotic comforts)

hyperedges.label: Saturn's named affliction periods from Moon: Janma Sani (1st), Ardhashtama/Kantaka (4th), Kantaka (7th), Ashtama (8th), plus Sade Sati spanning 12-1-2
Houses 3, 6, 11 from Moon = universally auspicious transit houses for Mars, Saturn, Rahu, Ketu (and Sun in 3,6,11)
Each planet's single WORST transit house from Moon (Tamil texts): Sun-5th, Moon-8th, Mars-7th, Mercury-2nd, Jupiter-3rd, Venus-7th, Saturn-1st(Janma Sani)
